name: Dimensions International College
tagline: Comprehensive private education from Cambridge IGCSE to degree pathways
description: Dimensions International College is a well-established private education institution in Singapore, operating across multiple campuses including its main high school campus in Kovan. The college offers the Cambridge International curriculum at primary, secondary (IGCSE), and pre-university (A-Level) levels, alongside AEIS preparatory courses and a range of diploma and degree programmes in partnership with UK universities. With approximately 500 students across its school-level programmes, Dimensions provides a flexible, accessible route for both local and international students. The college is registered with the Committee for Private Education (CPE) and holds EduTrust certification, assuring quality standards across all its offerings.

admission.process: Applications are accepted monthly. Students submit academic records and sit for a placement test. The admissions team evaluates each application individually and may request an interview.
requirements: Placement test in English and Mathematics
admission.deadlines: Monthly intakes throughout the year (except February, June, and December). Contact admissions for upcoming intake dates.

faqs.question: Does Dimensions offer AEIS preparation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dimensions runs a dedicated AEIS (Admissions Exercise for International Students) preparatory programme to help international students prepare for entry into Singapore mainstream government schools at primary and secondary levels.

faqs.question: Can students progress to university after completing A-Levels at Dimensions?
faqs.answer: Yes. Students who complete Cambridge A-Levels at Dimensions can apply to universities worldwide, and the college also offers in-house diploma and degree progression pathways through its partnerships with UK universities.

seo.title: Dimensions International College Singapore — Cambridge IGCSE, A-Level & AEIS Prep | EduAtlas
seo.description: Dimensions International College in Kovan: Cambridge Primary, IGCSE and A-Level programmes. AEIS preparatory courses. 500 students. View 2026 fees, intakes and admissions.
